domain: Andean Chullpa burial-tower (Aymara/Quechua pre-Inca and Inca, Lake Titicaca region): cylindrical/conical stone tower for elite ancestors; corbel-vault circular self-support; 3-zone stratification base/shaft/cap; thermal-air-cavity ventilation; cardinal-oriented entrance.
specific_mechanism: CHULLPA-3-ZONE-CORBEL-FAMILY-VENT-CARDINAL: (1) S_3zone 3-zone stratification (base/shaft/cap); (2) C_corbel corbel-vault self-supporting; (3) G_family per-cohort family grouping; (4) T_vent thermal-air-cavity ventilation; (5) O_orient ritual cardinal-anchor orientation.
